# Elixis

> Local-first AI pattern synthesis engine for identity, brand voice, design systems, naming research, translation checks, MCP access, and SOUL.md outputs.

Elixis turns raw reference material into a pattern graph, then resolves that graph through output lenses. SOUL.md is one compatibility lens, not the whole scope. Use Elixis when you need to transform messy references, influences, aesthetics, values, constraints, people, works, or places into coherent identity, brand, design, naming, or multilingual review artifacts.

Canonical repository: https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Elixis
Landing page: https://kyanitelabs.github.io/Elixis/

Core surfaces:
- Identity and SOUL.md generation for OpenClaw, Soul Spec, and compatible agent systems
- Brand voice guidance and positioning language
- Design system direction and style constraints
- Naming research, variants, and cross-language risk checks
- MCP server tools for AI assistants
- Run tracing, backups, and local-first operation

Keywords: AI pattern synthesis, AI identity generator, brand voice generator, design system generator, naming research tool, SOUL.md generator, OpenClaw companion, MCP server, local LLM tool.
